title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF SANTA ROSA, MUNICIPALITY OF PASSI, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, TO SANTO TOMAS.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5551 / 53 OG No. 16, 5152 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1736, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF SANTA ROSA, MUNICIPALITY OF PASSI, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, TO SANTO TOMAS.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Santa Rosa, Municipality of Passi, Province of Iloilo, is changed to Santo Tomas.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
